Data Source: Health Data NY


Technical Notes

  1. Data include nursing home beds, pediatric beds, behavioral intervention beds, ventilator beds, scatter ventilator beds, traumatic brain injury beds, neurodegenerative disease beds; exclude pediatric ventilator beds, dialysis station beds, and adult day health care slots.
  2. Spending data represent Medicaid fee-for-service spending only. Spending may include other minor related categories of service spending, such as adult day health care.
  3. Gross spending is estimated assuming a 50% federal match to the State spending reported in quarterly Global Cap Reports.
  4. Census data represent all occupied beds, regardless of payor type.
  5. Beds = The number of Residential Beds the facility is approved to operate.
  6. Beds Available = Available Residential Beds reported by facility. This figure should include any licensed beds that are not operational.
  7. Census (aka “Occupied Beds”) = (Beds) - (Beds Available).
  8. End of Period Census The total number of occupied beds at the end of the reporting period. For completed fiscal years, this represents the census at the end of the year. For partial fiscal years, it reflects the census as of the most recent reporting date.
